title: holosteum sinense
intro: Holosteum sinense, also known as Chinese bird's eye cress or bird's eye gill, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Holosteum sinense include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
